skip_reason: Hayward OmniLogic requires real account credentials (HAYWARD_USER + HAYWARD_PW) to authenticate; this polish environment has no test account. Phase 5 live acceptance must be produced by the printer (rzehner) in their own environment via: printing-press dogfood --dir <cli> --spec <spec> --live --level quick --write-acceptance .manuscripts/<run-id>/proofs/phase5-acceptance.json
